info.title: API Portal - API Provider (CF)
info.description: API Provider defines the connection details for services running on specific hosts. Apart from the details of the specific hosts, API provider can also be used to define any further details that are necessary to establish the connection. For example, proxy settings. There is also a provision to create API Provider of type Cloud Integration. To discover the services, create the provider with destType CPIDISCOVERY, and for Cloud Integration Flow, create a provider with destType CPIRUNTIME.

x-sap-shortText: Enables you to define the connection details for services running on specific hosts.
